title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II
titleCn: 买卖股票的最佳时机 II

testcases.input: prices = [7,1,5,3,6,4] Output: 7 Explanation: Buy on day 2 (price = 1) and sell on day 3 (price = 5), profit = 5-1 = 4. Then buy on day 4 (price = 3) and sell on day 5 (price = 6), profit = 6-3 = 3. Total profit is 4 + 3 = 7.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: Buy on day 2 (price = 1) and sell on day 3 (price = 5), profit = 5-1 = 4. Then buy on day 4 (price = 3) and sell on day 5 (price = 6), profit = 6-3 = 3. Total profit is 4 + 3 = 7.

testcases.input: prices = [1,2,3,4,5] Output: 4 Explanation: Buy on day 1 (price = 1) and sell on day 5 (price = 5), profit = 5-1 = 4. Total profit is 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: Buy on day 1 (price = 1) and sell on day 5 (price = 5), profit = 5-1 = 4. Total profit is 4.

testcases.input: prices = [7,6,4,3,1] Output: 0 Explanation: There is no way to make a positive profit, so we never buy the stock to achieve the maximum profit of 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There is no way to make a positive profit, so we never buy the stock to achieve the maximum profit of 0.
